rulings.Case Title: DARUKA WANIGATUNGA VS. CHANDRA CAROL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Chandra Carol'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer And Counterclaim
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 7, 2011, line 1. Defendant Chandra Carol's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Answer and Counter claim. Grant Motion to amend answer and deny filing of counter claim, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC VS. SAMANTHA SETHNA, AN INDIVIDUAL ALSO KNOWN AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 7, 2011, line 4. Defendant Samantha Sethna's Motion to Set Aside/Vacate Judgment. Grant pursuant to Section 473. Moving party to file answer forthwith and to post a month's rent. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. RONNIE WILBON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 7, 2011, line 6. Defendant Ronnie Wilson's Motion to Set Aside/Vacate Judgment. Grant subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NATASHA JAMBOR-SADEGHI VS. JEFFREY HAMRICK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Depositoon Answers
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 7, 2011, line 2. Defendants Jeffrey Hamrick and Jessica Edrosolan's Motion to Compel Production of Documents and Deposition Answers, Separate Statement. Off calendar, duplicative. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BD THAKOR DBA CIVIC CENTER HOTEL et al VS. ROSALIE SAKKARA CHARLES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Rosalie Charles' Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 7, 2011, line 3. Defendant Rosalie Charles' Demurrer to Complaint. Sustained with leave to amend, to attach agency agreement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERHIP, A CALIFORNIA VS. ANDRE PATTERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 7, 2011, line 4. Defendant Andre Patterson's Motino to Quash Service of Summons. Hearing Required. Server needs to appear. = (501/REQ)
